parsed_profile.dominant_engine: Episodic showcase with moral-philosophical frame and dramatic counterpoint appendix — separate narrative units within volumes share thematic concerns about desire, deception, and karmic justice, unified by cautionary tale structure
secondary_engines: Moral cautionary tale with comedic reversal
Trickster heist collection with frame narrative

craft_profile.pov_distance: Variable: close third-person during crisis (shared confusion/panic), external focalization in investigation (multiple perspectives), selective omniscience in moral fables (reader perceives corruption before characters)
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Mixed: short exclamatory for tension, longer descriptive for atmosphere, compressed action balanced against expanded reflective moral passages
craft_profile.paragraphing: Scene-based with clear breaks; verse bridges connect separate narrative units; narrator commentary transitions between story segments
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Naturalistic speech with classical markers in seduction; poetry embedded for romantic communication; interrogation Q&A reveals truth incrementally; verse-based dramatic exchange in appendix
craft_profile.description_method: Physical comedy in failure scenes; succinct action in death sequences; moral characterization over physical detail in fables; sparse object/action focus in heist sequences
craft_profile.exposition_method: Historical allusions via character explanations; interrogation reveals truth incrementally; poetic epigraphs frame moral context; protagonist's own statements during establishment; dramatic action conveys plot in appendix
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Ends mid-scene with unresolved threat; each story segment ends on disturbing image recontextualizing preceding events; suspense loops cascade across chapter boundaries; anticipation-release pattern in episode solutions
craft_profile.transition_method: Verse bridges between narratives; narrator commentary connects plot segments; direct scene cuts with character movement; chronological time markers between episodes; thematic connections bridge separate adventures

parsed_profile.structural_note: Three-layer structure in final arc: episodic demonstration chapters, frame narrative resolution, dramatic appendix — each serving distinct narrative function. Volume 2 operates as self-contained episodic collection with shared thematic concerns rather than linear plot progression.

reader_promise: Satisfying narrative closures where desire collapses, mysteries resolve through confession/interrogation, and vice receives karmic punishment — each volume delivers 3-5 distinct story units unified by moral-philosophical concerns about desire, deception, and justice; clever protagonists demonstrate exceptional skills through episodic adventure; meta-narrative reflection through theatrical framing provides closure beyond story resolution
core_engine: Cautionary tale engine with episodic showcase and frame resolution — operates through: (1) prolonged courtship structures reaching consummation then collapsing via deus ex machina, (2) investigation sequences escalating through confession revelation and interrogation exposure, (3) underworld dream sequences delivering moral justice, (4) trickster skill demonstrations with wager stakes, (5) false accusation forcing frame resolution with rival transformation. Each narrative unit follows desire→exposure→punishment or skill→challenge→success arc, unified by verse bridges and narrator moral framing.
state_variables: {'desire_arc': {'initial': 'Protagonist drawn toward forbidden object/person', 'progression': 'Seduction progresses through prolonged courtship (挨光 structure), poetry exchange, go-between facilitation', 'peak': 'Consummation moment reached', 'collapse': "Husband's timely return as deus ex machina; bed-hiding comic resolution", 'resolution': 'Both participants punished; affair exposed'}, 'investigation_arc': {'initial': 'Death/mystery requiring resolution', 'progression': 'Alcohol confession breaks silence; deception network expands', 'resolution': 'Magistrate interrogation exposes lies; innocent exonerated; guilty witness suicide'}, 'moral_fable_arc': {'initial': 'Underworld bureaucracy operating through dreams', 'progression': 'Virtuous character rewarded; underworld justice delivered', 'complication': "Sibling contrast reveals surviving character's corruption", 'resolution': 'Virtuous transcendence achieved; new vice seeded for future arcs'}, 'trickster_arc': {'initial': 'Protagonist demonstrates exceptional skills through unrelated adventures', 'progression': 'Moral code established through contrasting cases (villainous wealthy vs deserving poor); wager system tests character', 'resolution': 'Frame narrative accusation forces resolution; protagonist achieves moral elevation through unfavorable comparison to hypocritical officials; peaceful retirement through deliberate non-use of skills'}}
reader_rewards: Multiple satisfying closures per volume through cascading narrative reversals
Comic catharsis from bed-hiding and husband-return deus ex machina moments
Moral clarity through karmic justice delivered in underworld dream sequences
Admiration for clever protagonist improvisation in impossible escape scenarios
Intellectual pleasure from interrogation reveals where reader deduces alongside magistrate
Meta-narrative reflection through theatrical appendix providing closure beyond story
Thematic coherence across disparate episodic units united by desire/deception justice
Cultural literacy through classical allusions and historical references

risk_patterns: {'risk': 'llm_fallback', 'severity': 'high', 'description': '22 of 25 chapters in volume 1 returned no parseable data; volumes 1 and 3 are distillation fallbacks limiting aggregation reliability', 'mitigation': 'Primary analysis drawn from volumes 2 and 4 which have complete data'}

{'risk': 'explicit_content', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Explicit sexual content in seduction/bed-hiding sequences; detailed suicide process in confession resolution', 'mitigation': 'Content serves cautionary tale function; moral framing provides context'}

{'risk': 'adultery_narrative', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Adultery presented as romantic narrative subject with sympathetic protagonist perspective', 'mitigation': 'Karmic punishment structure ensures vice is punished'}

{'risk': 'gender_punishment', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Punishment of female characters through beating and forced exposure', 'mitigation': 'Male participants also punished; moral frame critiques behavior not gender'}

{'risk': 'didactic_delivery', 'severity': 'low', 'description': 'Moral lesson delivery through verse may feel preachy to contemporary readers', 'mitigation': 'Entertainment value maintained through comedy and clever plotting'}

{'risk': 'episodic_fatigue', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Multiple episodic structure may feel repetitive without escalating stakes', 'mitigation': 'Frame narrative and volume-level thematic unity provide progression'}

{'risk': 'method_revelation', 'severity': 'low', 'description': 'Confession scenes reveal methods, potentially reducing future tension', 'mitigation': 'Serves closure function; new challenges created through different contexts'}

{'risk': 'structural_cohesion', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Theatrical appendix has no narrative connection to frame story; table of contents placement suggests incomplete chapter', 'mitigation': 'Meta-narrative closure function explicitly signaled; intentional design choice'}

{'risk': 'accessibility_barriers', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'Classical Chinese idioms, historical references, and dramatic format require annotation; scholarly apparatus interrupts reading flow', 'mitigation': 'Footnotes provide context; cultural knowledge assumed for appropriate audience'}

{'risk': 'tonal_inconsistency', 'severity': 'low', 'description': 'Multi-chapter gaps and scene cuts create discontinuous narrative texture; tonal inversion between fable and corruption reveal', 'mitigation': 'Verse bridges and narrator commentary provide continuity'}

{'risk': 'closure_expectation_mismatch', 'severity': 'low', 'description': 'Theatrical closure differs from narrative closure expectations; chapter ends unresolved dependent on next chapter', 'mitigation': 'Each volume provides self-contained story units; suspense loops are intentional'}
